title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Tama, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Passage between 2nd floor treasure repository and 3rd floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KIKU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can you keep going with those wounds?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehehe- how can you ask a Samural that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is nothing but an itch. It'll subside when the embers of my life fade.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Besides, my heart ached much more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Back when you disappeared!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Big Brother!! Uwaaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you still have strength to tease me, you must be fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I'm sorry I left without telling you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 120, What do you think will become of wano if we succeed in opening the country?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can discuss the minutae if we survive till morning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kalpa-PA! That's a big if!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The situation has already escalated into an all-out war!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We either achieve victory or die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our allies are probably short-handed on all fronts. I will find momonosuke-sama and protect him alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rest of you split up and reinforce the others!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Right!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kin' Emon- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Please allow me to finish Kanjuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huff... huff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I won't fail this time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Master Nekoma- Mush!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shishilian! Bariete!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: OH! MASTER!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where are you hurrying off to!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, Kin'Emon, Neko, I'll be on my way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Like- wise!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Very well! May fortune smile upon you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kiku, come with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yessir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What?! Pedro's dead?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, it apparently happened in big mom's territory...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His sacrifice made it possible for Luffy and the others to reach wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man responsible for his death is on the island now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: carrot and wanda went after him in a rage,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I went to let Captain Shishilian know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: pedro... How admirable of you-meow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So he's on this island, is he?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: MeOW!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That cat's flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Master!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 1st floor attic

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Watch out for the Marys, okay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Beast Pirates will assume we're still together,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So I'm going to head out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and serve as bait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This'll be your decoy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're obviously itching for an excuse to fight...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yamato, we'll be fine. Kin'emon- Sama has made contact with us.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 55 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
